services.title: Workers and Pages query
services.summary: List Workers scripts, routes, Pages projects; diff vs config; optional --import --yes (JSON on stdout).

services.title: Workers and Pages deploy
services.summary: Deploy managed workers via wrangler deploy and Pages via wrangler pages deploy; push secrets from vault.

services.title: Workers and Pages maintain
services.summary: Sync routes and secrets from config; optional --redeploy to refresh worker code.

services.title: Workers and Pages teardown
services.summary: Delete managed Workers scripts or Pages projects (requires --yes).

next_steps: Run `hdc run infrastructure cloudflare-workers query --` to verify drift after deploy or maintain.
Bootstrap: `query -- --import --yes` to seed workers[] and pages[] from the live account.
Ensure wrangler is installed (`npm install -g wrangler` or per-project devDependency).
